data.title: LinQ Minerals Consolidates Key Roles With New Company Secretary and CFO
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Linq Minerals Limited ( (AU:LNQ) ) has provided an update.

LinQ Minerals has confirmed that Simon Durack has formally assumed sole responsibility as both Company Secretary and Chief Financial Officer. The board-approved consolidation of these key governance and financial roles signals a streamlined executive structure that may enhance administrative efficiency and decision-making for the ASX-listed miner.

The appointment follows an earlier announcement in March and marks the completion of LinQ’s planned transition in its corporate leadership functions. Investors and stakeholders are likely to view the move as a step toward tighter oversight of compliance and financial management as the company advances its minerals projects.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:LNQ) stock is a Buy with a A$0.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Linq Minerals Limited stock, see the AU:LNQ Stock Forecast page.

More about Linq Minerals Limited

LinQ Minerals Limited is an Australian resources company listed on the ASX under the ticker LNQ. The company operates in the minerals and mining sector, focusing on exploration and development activities from its base in West Perth, Western Australia.

Average Trading Volume: 1,104,002

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

BPM Minerals Ltd. ( (AU:BPM) ) has shared an update.

BPM Minerals has applied to the ASX for quotation of 204,000 new ordinary fully paid shares, following the exercise or conversion of existing options or other convertible securities. The additional shares modestly expand the company’s capital base and may slightly increase liquidity in BPM’s stock, but do not by themselves signal a change in the firm’s strategic direction or operations.

The issuance, dated 14 April 2026, reflects routine capital management activity common among junior resource explorers on the ASX. While relatively small in scale, the move confirms continued investor participation in BPM’s equity structure and maintains the company’s access to public capital markets for future exploration and development funding needs.

An update from Clime Capital Limited ( (AU:CAM) ) is now available.

Clime Capital Limited reported a post-tax net tangible asset backing of 83.5 cents per share as at 31 March 2026, against a share price of $0.695, highlighting a discount to NTA. The company’s investment portfolio stands at $154.8 million, with performance since inception of 10.14% per annum before fees and taxes.

data.title: Truscott steps up Westminster gold push with new drilling results and project upgrade plans
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Truscott Mining Corporation Ltd ( (AU:TRM) ).

Truscott Mining has reported results from its February 2026 reverse circulation drilling campaign at the Westminster Project, where six holes totalling 1,312 metres at Orebody Exploration Target Two intersected shear zones and low-grade gold mineralisation, including several intercepts above 0.5 grams per tonne. The data will be used to refine structural models, improve target placement, and support an updated JORC 2012 Mineral Resource Estimate, with diamond drilling planned at Orebody Exploration Target One and steps under way to convert more tenure into mining leases, signalling a transition toward more advanced project development.

Management says 2026 marks a transformational phase as Truscott moves from an R&D-centric explorer to a more fully fledged developer, supported by board and executive changes and a growing technical database. Although logistical issues such as rig mechanical problems, wet weather and challenging ground conditions affected the recent RC program, the company plans to shift to diamond core drilling at Westminster to improve drill control and data quality, underpinning its push to de-risk the project and enhance its position in the Northern Territory gold sector.

More about Truscott Mining Corporation Ltd

Truscott Mining Corporation Ltd is an Australian mineral exploration company focused on gold development at its 100%-owned Westminster Project near Tennant Creek in the Northern Territory. After a decade as a research and development-driven explorer using mathematical models to identify mineralisation, the company is now expanding its corporate governance and operational capacity to progress toward resource development.

Average Trading Volume: 58,962

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$17.1M

For an in-depth examination of TRM stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: QIMC Secures C$15 Million Bought Deal to Advance Hydrogen and Helium Exploration
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Quebec Silica Resources Corp. ( (TSE:QIMC) ) has shared an announcement.

Québec Innovative Materials Corp. has arranged a C$15.0 million bought deal private placement of 16,667,000 units at C$0.90 each, with each unit comprising one common share and one warrant exercisable at C$1.30 for 36 months. The financing, conducted under the listed issuer financing exemption and led by Research Capital Corporation, could rise by about C$2.25 million if an over-allotment option is exercised, and the company plans to use the proceeds to advance its hydrogen and helium exploration projects and for working capital.

The offering, expected to close around the week of April 27, 2026, remains subject to customary regulatory approvals, including from the Canadian Securities Exchange, and will provide freely tradeable securities in most Canadian provinces. QIMC also highlighted Nova Scotia’s new C$30 million Subsurface Energy R&D Investment Program and confirmed it is applying for a grant under this initiative, potentially adding non-dilutive funding support for its onshore exploration activities.

More about Quebec Silica Resources Corp.

Québec Innovative Materials Corp. is a North American exploration and development company focused on natural hydrogen and critical mineral projects. The company is advancing a district-scale hydrogen exploration model across Québec, Ontario and other regions, positioning itself within the emerging low-carbon energy and critical materials sectors.

Average Trading Volume: 1,166,294

data.title: Cue Energy Urges Rejection of Horizon Bid as New NT Gas Deal Boosts Outlook
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Cue Energy Resources Limited ( (AU:CUE) ) is now available.

Cue Energy Resources has issued a supplementary target’s statement in response to Horizon Oil’s off‑market takeover bid, with its Independent Board Committee maintaining a unanimous recommendation that shareholders reject the offer. The document, lodged with ASIC and ASX, confirms that shareholders do not need to take any action to reject Horizon’s proposed acquisition of all remaining Cue shares.

The company also announced that the Palm Valley Joint Venture, including Cue, has signed a new binding multi‑year gas sales agreement with the Northern Territory Government. Supported by a final investment decision to drill two new wells supplying up to 21 petajoules of gas on a firm basis from late 2026 to 2034, the deal is expected to materially increase Cue’s contracted gas position, revenues and cash flows from its onshore Australian assets.

Preparations for drilling are advanced, with approvals progressing, long‑lead items ordered, a rig contracted and civil works largely complete ahead of first drilling in mid‑2026 and staged production from the second half of 2026. The agreement replaces a previous letter of intent with Power and Water Corporation that had contemplated Mereenie field supply, and the Mereenie wells outlined in that arrangement are no longer committed, signaling a strategic shift in Cue’s future gas development focus.

More about Cue Energy Resources Limited

Cue Energy Resources Limited is an Australian oil and gas company with onshore assets including participation in the Palm Valley Joint Venture in the Northern Territory. The company focuses on natural gas production and long-term supply contracts to domestic customers, underpinning its revenue base and operational cash flows in the Australian energy market.

Average Trading Volume: 698,112

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: A$97.97M

See more data about CUE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Zenith Energy Wins Tunisian Recognition of Oil Ownership as Robbana Field Hit by Vandalism
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Zenith Energy ( (GB:ZEN) ) just unveiled an update.

Zenith Energy has secured formal recognition from the Republic of Tunisia that its subsidiary Ecumed Petroleum Tunisia owns the Robbana and El Bibane production concessions and approximately 3,987 barrels of crude oil produced there since 2022. Together with a further 8,000 barrels stored at Robbana, the unsold inventory highlights the scale of revenue lost amid past restrictions on sales.

The admission by Tunisian authorities marks a significant step in Zenith’s arbitration case at the International Centre for Settlement of Investment Disputes, where it is seeking compensation for alleged unlawful obstruction and expropriation. However, the company reports that the Robbana field has suffered extensive vandalism and theft, leaving it non-operational and requiring major rehabilitation, a development Zenith says further deepens the damages claimed by its subsidiaries and underscores ongoing operational and legal risks in Tunisia.

More about Zenith Energy

Zenith Energy Ltd. is an independent, revenue-generating energy company with production, exploration and development assets in North Africa, the United States and Europe. Listed in London, Oslo and Sweden, it focuses on developing proven producing energy assets and undertaking low-risk exploration tied to existing production.

Average Trading Volume: 1,432,826

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £60.05M

See more insights into ZEN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from Cuscal Limited ( (AU:CCL) ) is now available.

Cuscal Limited has outlined plans for two equity issues, comprising a securities purchase plan to issue up to 750,000 ordinary fully paid shares and a separate placement or other type of issue for up to 7,500,000 shares. The new securities, scheduled for issue between 20 April and 13 May 2026, signal a meaningful capital raising that could strengthen Cuscal’s balance sheet, expand its funding capacity and potentially dilute existing shareholders while broadening its investor base.

The securities purchase plan is set with a record date of 13 April 2026 and will close on 6 May 2026, allowing eligible investors to participate directly in the capital raising. Alongside the larger placement component, the dual-structure offer underscores Cuscal’s use of the ASX capital markets to support its future corporate and operational needs, with timing and structure designed to provide flexibility in tapping both institutional and retail demand.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CCL) stock is a Buy with a A$5.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cuscal Limited stock, see the AU:CCL Stock Forecast page.

More about Cuscal Limited

Cuscal Limited, listed on the ASX under the code CCL, operates as a publicly traded company that issues ordinary fully paid shares. data.title: Winton Wins Fast-Track Approval for Ayrburn Film Studio Hub
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Winton Land Limited ( (AU:WTN) ) just unveiled an update.

Winton Land Limited has secured conditional fast-track approval for its Ayrburn Screen Hub project under New Zealand’s Fast-track Approvals Act 2024, with an Expert Panel issuing a final decision that is still subject to a 20-working-day appeal period. The company says the hub, positioned near the Ayrburn Hospitality Precinct and Northbrook Arrowtown between Arrowtown and Lake Hayes, will be an all-inclusive film studio and accommodation complex designed to bolster New Zealand’s film and television infrastructure.

The Ayrburn Screen Hub will allow film productions to work and stay on-site through filming, production and post-production, offering studio buildings, workrooms, office space, dressing rooms, a screening room, meeting facilities and 201 accommodation units for film workers and visitors when no productions are underway. Winton’s Queenstown general manager, Lauren Christie, said the development is expected to generate meaningful employment and economic growth for the region while also delivering further improvements to water quality on the wider Ayrburn site.

More about Winton Land Limited

Winton Land Limited is a residential land developer specialising in integrated, fully masterplanned neighbourhoods across 12 masterplanned communities. Its portfolio comprises about 20 projects expected to deliver roughly 5,750 residential lots, dwellings, apartments, retirement village units and commercial lots, and the company is dual-listed on the NZX and ASX.

Learn more about WTN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Legend Mining flags strong gold targets and solid cash ahead of Pinnacle Well drilling
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Legend Mining Limited ( (AU:LEG) ) just unveiled an update.

Legend Mining reported a productive March 2026 quarter at its Pinnacle Well Project near Leonora, driven by completion of induced polarisation geophysical surveys at the Alpha North and Pyrophyllite Hill prospects. The company ended the period with a cash balance of $10.2 million, supported by an $811,000 R&D refund, providing a solid funding base for upcoming drilling.

Survey work at Alpha North defined coincident chargeable and resistive features over a 700-metre strike, aligned with anomalous geochemistry, quartz veining, historic gold workings and significant regional shears, materially enhancing the area’s gold prospectivity. At Pyrophyllite Hill, a 600-metre NW-SE trending chargeability-resistivity anomaly consistent with key regional structures suggests disseminated sulphides and silica alteration at depth, with drill program approvals underway and field drilling targeted to commence in July 2026.

More about Legend Mining Limited

Legend Mining Limited is an Australian mineral exploration company focused on gold and base metals in Western Australia. Its key assets include the Pinnacle Well Project in the Leonora District, targeting intrusive-related and structurally controlled vein-hosted gold and VMS-style zinc-copper-lead-silver mineralisation, along with interests in the Rockford project in the Fraser Range for nickel, copper, zinc, silver and gold.

Average Trading Volume: 754,433

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$26.23M
